comments.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "eval.yml now imports rebar.llm.evals.eval (both occurrences); verified locally the offline validate job passes on all 9 packaged specs. Merged to origin/main; the operational 'green on main' AC isn't statically verifiable. Closing uncertified by design.". Session: 57b2b325b.

compiled_state.description:
## Summary
The prompt-eval GitHub Actions workflow (.github/workflows/eval.yml) fails on every main push: the offline 'validate every packaged eval spec' job does `from rebar.llm import eval`, but that module was moved to the evals/ subpackage (rebar.llm.evals.eval) in the 07-03 reorg (1fb66466d). Job dies at ImportError before validating any spec.

## Reproduction Steps
1. Push to main (or run the prompt-eval workflow).
2. Observe the offline validate job: ImportError: cannot import name 'eval' from 'rebar.llm'.

## Expected vs Actual
- Expected: the job validates all packaged eval specs and passes.
- Actual: ImportError at eval.yml:64 (and :114) -> job fails.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] eval.yml inline scripts import rebar.llm.evals.eval (both occurrences).
- [ ] The offline validate job validates all packaged eval specs (verified: 9 specs) and the prompt-eval workflow is green on main.
compiled_state.title: prompt-eval CI red on main: stale 'from rebar.llm import eval' after evals/ subpackage reorg
